mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS indicates strengthening household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 RSAFS April 2024 vintage value was 705180.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tercile tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is high and CPIAUCSL inflation remains elevated, restrictive real policy rates raise equity discount rates and compress valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 5.0% while CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds 3.0%
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 FEDFUNDS May 2024 vintage value was 5.33
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE indicates deteriorating labor demand and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 UNRATE May 2024 vintage value was 4.0
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 forward returns after triggered UNRATE increases are not lower than unconditional 60-day returns, or if the signal has negative out-of-sample classification precision versus the baseline positive-rate model.

mechanism_narrative: A positive turn in INDPRO momentum indicates improving production volumes and operating leverage for cyclicals, raising expected earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month percent change crosses from below 0 to above 0
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 INDPRO April 2024 vintage value was 102.7623
failure_condition: Reject if triggered positive INDPRO reversals have an average 20-day S&P 500 return less than or equal to the unconditional average, or if hit rate is below 50% across at least 30 triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction activity, lowering cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 HOUST April 2024 vintage value was 1360.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or if triggered returns are not statistically below non-triggered returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS continues to expand while UNRATE is flat or falling, the labor market supports income growth without visible unemployment stress, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is less than or equal to 0.1 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 PAYEMS May 2024 vintage value was 158543.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-stable condition does not outperform either single-series condition alone in 20-day forward returns, or if interaction term t-statistic is below 1.65 out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in CPIAUCSL raises expected policy restraint and discount-rate pressure, causing short-horizon equity multiple compression and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses above its 12-month inflation rate
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 CPIAUCSL May 2024 vintage value was 313.225
failure_condition: Reject if CPI acceleration triggers are followed by nonnegative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered 5-day returns are not below zero at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth slows while FEDFUNDS remains restrictive, tight financial conditions transmit into weaker aggregate demand and earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter annualized growth falls below 1.0% while FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2024-06-15 GDPC1 2024-01-01 vintage value was 22749.846
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-GDPC1-growth and high-FEDFUNDS condition does not have lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than high-FEDFUNDS observations with stronger GDPC1 growth, or if the interaction coefficient has the wrong sign out of sample.
